Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Sorry about what happened the other day. But I've been practicing my cooking, and I want you to see how much I've improved! {f 1 3 157}[n]I'm a little nervous about going into your classroom, so I'll wait for you in the hallway on the second floor.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Would you like to go home together?[n]{f 1 5 0}I'll be waiting in the second-floor hallway. I'd love to chat with you on the way back. {f 1 3 156}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Could you come with me to Paulownia Mall on the way home? Going there alone makes me feel a little nervous. {f 1 3 138}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I've been thinking a lot about what we talked about last time.[n]{f 1 5 0}If you have some time, I'd like for you to see my progress.[n]{f 1 5 0}Hope you're feeling hungry! {f 1 3 157}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Sorry, I know this is kind of sudden, but I'd like to ask for your help with something. Can we meet up?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Have you been to the used bookstore at the strip mall? I've been wanting to check it out, and it'd make me really happy if you came along, too. {f 1 3 157}[n]You can find me in the second-floor hallway if you'd like to join me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Do you have some time today? I kind of want to talk to you.[n]{f 1 5 0}It's nothing particularly important, though.[n]{f 1 5 0}I'm just really grateful that you're always there for me. {f 1 3 157}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 1}-kun, do you have time after school?[n]{f 1 5 0}I'd like to talk with you alone. I think I'm finally ready to tell you how I feel.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Shall we? {f 1 3 157}[n]I was actually thinking of taking a break from practicing cooking today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I have a favor to ask you.[n]{f 1 5 0}Do you have some time after school today? There's somewhere I'd like to go. {f 1 3 157}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's something I really want to tell you right now.[n]{f 1 5 0}Oh, but it's nothing that serious. I just wanted to chat, like how we always do. {f 1 3 137}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Remember what we talked about the other day? I'm thinking of doing that today.[n]{f 1 5 0}Are you okay with that? {f 1 3 157}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}If you don't mind, could we meet after school?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}If you're not too busy, can we talk for a bit? {f 1 3 157}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}What are you up to, {f 4 1}-kun? Do you have a minute? {f 1 3 137}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Sorry, I know this is kind of out of the blue. {f 1 3 138}[n]But if you don't have any plans, shall we go somewhere together?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's a movie I'm interested in. It's a sci-fi movie that takes place in a realistic setting...[n]{f 1 5 0}It seems to be a fan favorite, so maybe you'll learn what makes it so charming![n]{f 1 5 0}If you're interested, would you like to watch it together? {f 1 3 137}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's going to be a festival at Naganaki Shrine tonight. I'd love to check it out. Would you like to come with me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I've been thinking... I'd really love to spend Christmas together with you. {f 1 3 137}[n]How about you? I'll be waiting for your reply.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'm a little concerned about Amada-kun.[n]{f 1 5 0}Ever since second semester started, he's been looking kind of down.[n]{f 1 5 0}He won't tell me anything, so I was hoping you'd drop by his room and check in on him. Could you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}How was Amada-kun?[n]{f 1 5 0}Maybe I'm just overthinking it, but it wouldn't hurt to talk to him.[n]{f 1 5 0}Could you drop by his room and check in on him?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_042_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'll be at the couch on the second floor today. If you'd like to go to Tartarus, please look for me there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_044_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'll be on the third floor today. If you'd like to go to Tartarus, please look for me there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_046_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'll be inside the command room today. If you'd like to go to Tartarus, please look for me there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_048_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}When Koro-chan sits outside the dorm, he kind of looks like a guardian angel.[n]{f 1 5 0}I wonder if he gets cold though...[n]{f 1 5 0}I'm a little worried he'll get sick, so please check on him whenever you see him at the front entrance, okay? {f 1 3 157}[n]{f 1 1}
